comment: Fixed-width tax table import — monthly period. Record layout per national tax authority specification (Postbeskrivning). One record = one income bracket with deduction amounts for all six taxpayer columns.

key.comment: Composite key: period-type + table-number, e.g. '30 34' (monthly, table 34)

rangeValue.comment: Lower income bound of the bracket (SEK or local currency)

values.name: Col1
values.comment: Deduction for employees under 66 years of age

values.name: Col2
values.comment: Deduction for pension recipients aged 66 or over

values.name: Col3
values.comment: Deduction for employees aged 66 or over

values.name: Col4
values.comment: Deduction for sickness/activity compensation recipients under 66

values.name: Col5
values.comment: Deduction for other pensionable income recipients

values.name: Col6
values.comment: Deduction for pension income recipients under 66
